summary: Tested multi-channel print feature for POS restaurant system. All tests passed including: 5-digit PIN login (10000), product print channel configuration, multi-channel selection UI, and multi-channel print job creation when sending order to kitchen.
passed_tests: TestLogin::test_login_with_5_digit_pin - Admin PIN 10000 (5 digits) login works
TestProductPrintChannels::test_product_has_multichannel - Product 'Tostones con Queso' has multi-channel (kitchen, bar)
TestProductPrintChannels::test_update_product_print_channels - Product print_channels update via API works
TestMultiChannelPrintJob::test_send_comanda_multichannel - Multi-channel print jobs created when sending order (kitchen + bar)
TestPrintChannelSection::test_print_channels_have_required_fields - All print channels have required fields
UI: Login page with visual PIN pad and 8-dot display (supports up to 8 digits)
UI: Product config page loads with Canal de Impresión section visible
UI: 'Usar el de la Categoría' default option displayed with 'Por defecto' badge
UI: All channel options (Cocina, Bar, Recibo) visible with printer names and code badges
UI: Multi-selection works - 'Imprimirá en: Cocina Bar' indicator shows when channels selected
UI: Save button works and persists multi-channel selection
critical_code_review_comments: ProductConfig.js correctly implements multi-channel selection with checkboxes (lines 407-511)
Backend server.py lines 1277-1359 correctly splits comanda by channel, supporting product-level print_channels
Product model includes print_channels array field that takes priority over category channel
Login.js supports 4-8 digit PINs with visual feedback on 8-dot display
seed_data_creation: Fixed Admin PIN hash to support 10000 login
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-channel print feature fully implemented and tested. Product 'Tostones con Queso' has print_channels=['kitchen', 'bar']. When sending order to kitchen via /api/print/send-comanda/{order_id}, system creates separate print jobs for each channel. UI in ProductConfig.js allows multi-selection of channels. Admin PIN is 10000.

features_verified.default_category_option: ✓ 'Usar el de la Categoría' with 'Por defecto' badge
features_verified.dynamic_channel_options: ✓ Cocina, Bar, Recibo all visible with printer names
features_verified.backend_multichannel_dispatch: ✓ Creates separate print jobs per channel
